category_sources: Official README calls it an ncurses-based command line torrent client.
source_facts.description says it is an ncurses BitTorrent client.
display_name_sources: Official README heading is RTorrent BitTorrent Client.
Official project page title is RTorrent.
docs_sources: Official README directs users to the GitHub Wiki and User Guide for usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/rakshasa/rtorrent; per instruction repo is returned as null when source_facts.repo is present.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics include torrent, bittorrent, bittorrent-client, rtorrent, and torrent-client.
